title: Feature: LDM & Liferay Auto-Discovery
body: Detect running LDM/Docker Tomcat instances locally to eliminate the need for manual configuration flags such as `LFT_TARGET_HOST` or explicit port specifications.

sub_issues.title: Implement Auto-Discovery Logic
sub_issues.body: Create an auto-discovery module that can detect running LDM docker containers or native Liferay Tomcat bundles bound to localhost by probing standard ports and docker socket.

sub_issues.title: Integrate Auto-Discovery into CLI
sub_issues.body: Update the CLI startup logic to automatically fall back to the auto-discovery mechanism if the target port or host is not explicitly provided.
